title: Validation errors return 422 instead of 400
evidence: lib/book_api/router.ex:24 — returns 422 on changeset error; idiomatic in Plug/Phoenix but TASK.md examples suggest 400
suggestion: No action needed — 422 Unprocessable Entity is appropriate for validation errors in REST APIs

title: Extra input validation beyond spec (length limits, year range)
evidence: lib/book_api/book.ex:23-26 — validates title length (1-500), author length (1-255), isbn length (max 32), year range (-3000..9999)
suggestion: Enhancement beyond spec — good defensive coding
